title: Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref}}
{{Youmay|the regular feature in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''|the roleplaying sourcebook, ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''}}
{{MagazineDepartment
|image=
|title="Cracken's Rebel Operatives"
|author=
|illustrator=
|editor=
|publisher=
|published in=''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''
|first issue=
|last issue=
}}
"'''Cracken's Rebel Operatives'''" was a series of articles presented in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. Following roughly the same format as the [[Cracken's Rebel Operatives|book of the same name]], it profiled [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] under the command of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] chief [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. It also included [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] stats for inclusion in games of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.
